headline: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
summary: Discover the essential 2026 college graduation gift guide. Find perfect presents for grads starting jobs or new apartments. Help new graduates transition smoothly with thoughtful gifts.

headline: You can print, slice, and engrave using this desktop crafting machine
summary: xTool unveils a versatile desktop crafting machine. Features modular CMYK printing, laser cutting, and engraving. An affordable solution for aspiring Etsy entrepreneurs.

headline: Motorola says affiliate hijacking of Amazon app was ‘unintended’
summary: Motorola addresses 'unintended' Amazon app affiliate hijacking. Some phones redirected users to a tracking website. The company claims the issue has been promptly corrected.

headline: Sony is offering up to 50 percent off some of our favorite PS5 games
summary: Sony announces up to 50% off favorite PS5 games. Sale coincides with Summer Game Fest and a State of Play. Get ready for an extended look at Insomniac's Wolverine game.

headline: Adventure Time: Side Quests to Premiere First 2 Episodes at IGN Live 2026
summary: Adventure Time: Side Quests premieres at IGN Live 2026. Be among the first to see the new animated series. Catch the first two episodes on June 7th at 12:45pm PT.

headline: Marvel Legend Stan Lee to Be 'Resurrected' Through AI, With His Voice and Likeness Licensed for Commercial Use
summary: Stan Lee's voice and likeness to be 'resurrected' by AI. AI company will replicate the Marvel legend for commercial use. Controversial move brings Lee's persona into new media.

headline: X-Men '97 Season 2 Disney+ Release Date Confirmed, Debut Trailer Released
summary: X-Men '97 Season 2 hits Disney+ on July 1. New trailer reveals fresh characters and plot twists. Wolverine faces a dramatic reversal of fortunes.

headline: The 2026 MacBook Air With New Apple M5 Chip Drops to the Lowest Price Ever for Memorial Day
summary: 2026 MacBook Air (M5 chip) hits record low price. Amazon offers $200 off for Memorial Day. Grab the new Apple laptop at its best deal yet.

headline: Burnham accuses Blair of ignoring inequality as he hits back at ex-PM
summary: Labour's Andy Burnham criticizes Tony Blair's 'radical centre' vision. Burnham accuses ex-PM of neglecting inequality issues. Political tensions rise as Burnham hits back at Blair.

headline: Family of mum, 30, shot dead outside Sheffield bar pay tribute to 'beautiful soul'
summary: Family mourns Shanice Brookes, 30, shot dead in Sheffield. Tributes pour in for the 'beautiful soul'. Brookes was a charity worker and university student.

headline: Safety warning after nine water-related deaths during heatwave
summary: Nine water-related deaths reported during recent heatwave. Charities issue urgent warnings for water safety. Public advised to take extreme precautions when swimming.

headline: Almost 500,000 Russian soldiers killed in Ukraine war, GCHQ says
summary: GCHQ estimates nearly 500,000 Russian deaths in Ukraine. Director Anne Keast-Butler shared the staggering figures. The grim toll was part of a speech on UK security threats.
